name: Cream Puff Pastry
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 15 seconds
Combine water and butter in a medium saucepan; bring to a boil. Add flour and salt, all at once, stirring vigorously over medium-high heat until the mixture leaves the sides of the pan and forms a smooth ball. Remove from heat and cool for 4 to 5 minutes. Add eggs one at a time, beating thoroughly with a wooden spoon after each addition; then beat until the dough is smooth. Shape and bake the pastry immediately according to recipe directions. Yield: enough for one 7-inch or eight 2-inch cream puffs.
